x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Now Assist for ITSM requires Xanadu or later. Running Now Assist on an unsupported release will produce errors, missing features, or degraded AI functionality that cannot be resolved without upgrading.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Plan an upgrade to the latest Generally Available release (Zurich or newer). Now Assist ITSM capabilities expand with each release. Engage ServiceNow account team for upgrade planning.
